fields.summary: Provides methods for encoding images and animated sequences to the WebP format.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoder` is a static class that encodes single frames and animated sequences
to WebP format using <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions> to control quality and
compression. Use `Encode` for single images and `EncodeAnimated` for multi-frame
animated WebP files.

## Examples

```csharp
using var bitmap = new SKBitmap(200, 200);
using var canvas = new SKCanvas(bitmap);
canvas.Clear(SKColors.CornflowerBlue);

using var pixmap = bitmap.PeekPixels();
var data = SKWebpEncoder.Encode(pixmap, SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default);
if (data is not null)
    File.WriteAllBytes("output.webp", data.ToArray());
```
]]></format>

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded WebP data, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
